PARAMETERS
----------
  Model
    Z (nuclear charge)     = 8
    N (electrons)          = 8
    Hartree coefficient    = 1
    Exchange functional    = Slater exchange
    Correlation functional = Perdew & Wang
    Spin channels          = 1

  Discretization
    Angular momentum cutoff (lh) = 2
    Orbitals per channel (nh)    = 5
    Basis                        = P1IntLegendreGenerator (ordermax = 10)
    Number of basis functions    = 289
    Mesh                         = Exponential Mesh (s = 1.2,)
    Rmax                         = 1000.0
    Number of mesh points        = 30
    Integration method           = GaussLegendre (npoints = 1000)

  Algorithm = ODA
    scftol     = 1.0e-10
    tinit      = 0.6
    frozen_t   = false
    maxiter_ls = 100
    abstol_ls  = 2.220446049250313e-12
    reltol_ls  = 2.220446049250313e-12
    Aufbau = OptimizedAufbau
      max_degen               = 2
      tol                     = 0.001
      handle_degen_spin_1iter = true
